raw_text: This is an amazing platform....not only for daily groceries and immediate needs but also for electronics. The delivery partner's are also very good and helpful. Can't believe I can avoid going out for basic needs and get them delivered at home in reasonable prices.

no offer for new customer, in insta ad it was showing get, x rs off on your first order, but when signed in, no.such.offer was there, pure clickbait. Totally rubbish, i will prefer other delivery apps over it.

what a fast service I, m happy with the service and also from th user interface it's very easy to use i think that blinkit is a good option for anything that you don't have you can buy in it and in 20 to 10 minutes you will get your order

When I am ordering a pack of cards, I am not getting the payment option in it, I was seeing only blinkit money option there and when I paid in blinkit money, the order is not getting placed, And my 200 rupees also got stuck in the blinkit app. #blinkit #worstservices

lots of delays since last few months , orders are not arriving on time. seems it better to go and shop ourselves rather than order from blinkit. today order which was supposed arrive in 12 minutes arrived after 40 minutes. serious management issue here.

App is getting worse day by day. 10 min delivery is now turned to 30 mins, additionally we are paying the surge charges too. Blinkit store is hardly 5 mins away from my place still it takes 20-30 mins....😌

The worst customer service ever 😡 they don't even response. I order fiama soaps set ₹300 and delivery partner have taken one soap bar already from that box and also the remain box was also opened. we contact customer care we get👉🏻NO RESPONSE. When we call on the customer care number we get👉🏻 NO RESPONSE. we file the issue in the app in the morning and then now we checked it they just cut the conversation.in the future I will not use this app and I will suggest you all not to use this app😡

Excellent service and the app is easy to navigate. A suggestion for improvement is that whenever I apply a coupon even valid ones from Blinkit, it's not taking it immediately I had to apply it 4 to 5 times to make it work. so there are many coupons i cudn use..I use blinkit on daily basis and this is a slight issue that needs improvement.

My experience with Blinkit has been extremely disappointing and frustrating. Today, my wife placed an order for a few items that were urgently needed for cooking. Despite the promise of quick delivery, the order arrived after around 45 minutes. To make matters worse, two important items were missing from the delivery—the very items we were waiting for and needed the most. This is not an isolated incident. Just two days ago, Blinkit delivered a pack of eggs with multiple eggs broken, making them

​"Dear Blinkit Team, I completely understand that the order reflects a 1.0 mm size. However, this is a medical/healthcare tool meant for scalp treatment. My doctor has strictly advised against using a 1.0 mm needle on my scalp as it can cause bleeding, tissue damage, and permanent hair loss. I strictly need the 0.5 mm size for medical safety. Since this involves physical health safety, I request you to please make an exception and arrange a return/replacement for this product.

Disappointing service and an absolute waste of time. I’ve jumped through every hoop and provided all the "evidence" requested, but support still refuses to provide a real solution. Front-line agents just drain your energy without fixing anything.
They don't refund the amount after returning a damaged product. it's not just my experience. you can see tons of such experiences online. And it's been going on for a long time.

While the delivery was done shortly after placing the order, the delivery was done hand-to-hand and not in any delivery bag. one of the items was icecream. In such high summer temperatures, the icecream was not even packed in any insulated bag!! Both the items were delivered unprofessionally.

good but location is not accurate the delivery partner is not able to find the location accurate he standing at a distance every time every time whenever I order anything then I am seeing that the location glitches every time the delivery partner is not able to find my location accurate his moving near about 100 m from My location not 100 but near about 50 m from my location and always there is a glitch of location and it should be improved as soon as possible

The app is showing “Return completed” for my Omni Gel order, but my issue is still unresolved. I have not received proper refund assistance yet. Whenever I try to raise the issue in chat support, the chatbot automatically closes the conversation without connecting me to a support executive. I request you to kindly review the case manually and process the refund or provide a proper resolution as soon as possible. I have attached the relevant screenshots for reference. Thank you.

For me, Blinkit has honestly been a lifesaver. I trust it because, most of the time, it delivers exactly what I expect. Of course, there have been a few issues and occasional clashes here and there, but overall my experience has been really good. The convenience, quick delivery, and reliability are the reasons I keep going back to it. Over time, I’ve genuinely grown to love the service Blinkit provides.

from my recent experience the quality of the product is tooo bad... especially nandini products. the difference in the package can be easily noticable when compared with the one brought from dairy... uninstalling the application

after my 4th order whenever I add something in my cart and after that when I select to cash on delivery option its always shows this payment option is not available and when I order the same things from other phone it always gives cash on delivery option that's why I don't like this app

customer friendly shopping app. very remote issues related to quality of products. In case of such issues, swift action on refund process. One suggestion...Keep more options on each product to have scope to choose. Everything is fine. Keep it up!!

how pathetic is customer support, you are running a million dollar business and yet to properly provide a decent customer support, just left it to autobot chat support which is as good as a blank support. If I need any support out of the box, then alas there is no way. fyi UPI payment via UPI ID is not accepting.
